zh.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins於1568年9月7日與Edmund Yorke在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins于1568年9月7日与Edmund Yorke在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈丁斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Robins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the personal name Robin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Robin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Andre, Emile, Marcel, Achille, Armand, Arnaud, Camille, Julien, Michel, Normand.
French, Breton, Scottish, English, and German: from the personal name Robin, a pet form of Robert , composed of the short form Rob + the hypocoristic suffix -in.
Slovenian: topographic name derived from rob ‘edge, border’ (see Robar ).

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins married Edmund Yorke on 7 September 1568, in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She was buried in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins a épousé Edmund Yorke le 7 septembre 1568, à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elleenterrée à Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins hat am 7. September 1568 in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England Edmund Yorke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie wurde in Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins lei sposato Edmund Yorke il 7 settembre 1568, nel Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Fu sepolta a Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Robinsは1568年9月7日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンでEdmund Yorkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーディングストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins(은)는 1568년 9월 7일 영국 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에서 Edmund Yorke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 하르딩스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins casou-se com Edmund Yorke em 7 de setembro de 1568, em Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Hardingstone, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Katherine Robins вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Yorke 7 сентября 1568 г. в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности хардингстоун, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
